entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: UI Putovanje za učenje Povijest je fokusiran način za uporaba UI za učenje umjesto pasivne kolekcije odgovora. Način je izgradžen oko odredženog posla: Primi vremensku putovnicu, očisti putovnicu, zatim razišči odredženo povijesno društvo kroz scenu, mapu, vremensku liniju, ljude, pravila, inventar in dokaze.

entries.source: AI Time Travel For Learning History: practical guide
entries.value: AI Time Travel For Learning History: praktični vodnik

entries.source: AI Writing Coach For Essays, Stories, And Clearer Drafts is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Improve essays, stories, emails, and arguments with targeted feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: UI Pišuči trener Za Essays, Priče, I raščistiti nacrte je fokusiran način za uporaba UI za učenje umjesto pasivne kolekcije odgovora. Način se gradi oko specifičnog posla: Poboljšati eseje, priče, e-pošte, in argumenti z ciljanom povratnom informacijom ki drži vaš glas netaknut.
Povratne informacije z UI za pisanje za študente

entries.source: AI writing feedback that keeps your voice intact.
entries.value: UI povratna informacija za pisanje ki drži vaš glas netaknut.

entries.source: All inspir AI learning prompt starters
entries.value: Sve inspir UI učenje brzo pokretanje

entries.source: All public AI learning chats in one clear place.
entries.value: Sve javne UI učenje čavrljanja na jednom jasnom mjestu.

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: UI učenje pratitelj ne bi trebao pretvarati da je magični autoritet. To ne bi trebao izbrisati nevarnost, zamijeniti učitelje, ali vlak učiti kopirati odgovore. Najbolji sustavi su iskreni o ograničenjima in jasno o razlikama izmedžu pomoči in predaje.

entries.source: An electronic or physical signature of the person authorized to act on behalf of the owner of the copyright’s interest; A description of the copyrighted work that you claim has been infringed, including the URL (i.e., web page address) of the location where the copyrighted work exists or a copy of the copyrighted work; Identification of the URL or other specific location on Service where the material that you claim is infringing is located; Your address, telephone number, and email address; A statement by you that you have a good faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law; a statement by you, made under penalty of perjury, that the above information in your notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on the copyright owner’s behalf.
entries.value: Elektronski ali fizički potpis osobe ki je ovlaštena djelovati v ime vlasnika interesa autorskog prava; opis autorskog prava za ki tvrdite da je prekršen, uključujuči URL (tj. adresu web-stranice) lokacije kjer postoji autorski autorski rad ali kopiju autorskog djela; identifikaciju URL ali drugu posebnu lokaciju na Usluzi kjer se nalazi materijal za ki tvrdite da je narušen; Vaša adresa, telefonski broj in e-mail adresa; Izjava od vas da imate dobro vjerovanje da sporna uporaba nije odobrena od strane vlasnika autorskih prava, njegovog agenta ali zakona; izjava koju ste vi dali pod kaznom krivokletstva, da su gore navedene informacije v obvestila točne in da ste vi vlasnik autorskih prava ali ovlašteni da djelujete v ime vlasnika autorskih prava.

entries.source: an ordinary person affected by the decision;
Analyze a chart from my textbook
Answer a check question, try a step, debate a claim, revise a draft, or build recall cards.
entries.value: Odgovori na preverjalno vprašanje, poskusi korak, razpravljaj o trditvi, popravi osnutek ali ustvari kartice za priklic.

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
entries.value: Na aktivno vprašanje odgovorite s svojimi besedami

entries.source: Answer the learner directly, then offer two possible paths: simpler foundations or deeper exploration.
entries.value: Odgovorite izravno učenecu, a zatim nude dvije moguče staze: jednostavnije temelje ali globlje raziščivanje.

entries.source: Any contests, sweepstakes or other promotions (collectively, “Promotions”) made available through Service may be governed by rules that are separate from these Terms of Service. If you participate in any Promotions, please review the applicable rules as well as our Privacy Policy. If the rules for a Promotion conflict with these Terms of Service, Promotion rules will apply.
entries.value: Sva natječaja, čistice ali druge promocije (kolektivno, “Promocije”) ki se daju putem storitve mogu se upravljati pravilima ki su odvojena od teh Uvjeta storitve. Ako sudjelujete v promocijama, molimo vas da pregledate primjenjiva pravila kao in našu politiku zasebnosti. Ako se pravila za promociju sukoba z ovim Pogojima storitve, primjenjuju pravila promocije.

entries.source: API, admin, reset, private utility, and private saved-chat surfaces are not public source content.
entries.value: API, admin, reset, privatna komunalna in privatne površine za čavrljanje nisu vsebina javnog izvora.

entries.source: Applied AI learning work before the current AI wave.
entries.value: Primjenjen UI učenje rad preden postoječeg UI val.

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
Apply the idea to a new example.
Are audience pages public and indexable?
entries.value: Jesu li publika stranice javne in indeksabilne?

entries.source: Are private saved user conversations exposed to search?
entries.value: Jesu li privatni spremljeni korisnički razgovori izloženi pretraživanju?
Da li se javni čavrljanja mogu indeksirati?
Jesu li kvizi in kartice za ponavljanje uključeni?
So kvizi boljši od ponovnega branja?
Da li se subjekti mogu indeksirati?

entries.source: Are the articles connected to live AI learning tools?
entries.value: Da li su članci ptezani z živim UI alatima za učenje?

entries.source: Are these pages saying inspir replaces every learning platform?
entries.value: Da li te stranice kažu da inspir zamjenjuje svaku platformu za učenje?

entries.source: Are these pages written only for search engines?
entries.value: Jesu li te stranice napisane samo za pretraživače?

entries.source: Are these prompts just for ChatGPT?
entries.value: Jesu li ovi promovi samo za ChatGPT?

entries.source: Are these real public pages or just app screens?
entries.value: Jesu li ovo prave javne stranice ali samo zasloni aplikacija?

entries.source: Are these workflows free to try?
entries.value: Jesu li ti potek delaovi slobodni da pokušaju?

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Zagovarjajte obe strani in izostrite mišljenje

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.
entries.value: Art Appreciation Guide način učenja z UI je osredotočen način uporabe UI za učenje namesto pasivnega zbiranja odgovorov. Način je zgrajen okoli posebne naloge: Razišči artworks, styles, artists, visual choices, and what makes an image powerful.

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Art Appreciation Guide AI Learning Mode: praktični vodnik

entries.source: Art Appreciation Guide prompts and study loop
entries.value: Pozivi in učna zanka za Art Appreciation Guide

entries.source: Articles, mode guides, and prompt loops
entries.value: Članci, vodniki za način rada in zagonetne petlje

entries.source: Ask about goals, deadlines, available time, and current confidence.
entries.value: Vprašajte za ciljeve, rokte, dostupno vrijeme in trenutno povjerenje.

entries.source: Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Postavite katerokoli vprašanje in se učite z jasnimi razlagami, primeri, nadaljnjimi pozivi in potrpežljivim mentorstvom z UI.

entries.source: Ask audience, metric, risks, and how to include improvement.
entries.value: Vprašajte publiku, metriku, rizike, in kako uključiti poboljšanje.

entries.source: Ask Code Tutor for the simplest mental model, one example, and one thing beginners often misunderstand.
entries.value: Vprašajte učitelja koda za najjednostavniji mentalni načinel, jedan primer, in jedna stvar početnici često pogrešno.

entries.source: Ask current routine, target habit, and easiest daily version.
entries.value: Vprašajte trenutnu rutinu, naviku cilja, in najlakšu svakodnevnu verziju.

entries.source: Ask follow-ups, evaluate accuracy and confidence, correct gaps, and retry.
entries.value: Vprašajte pračenja, procijenite natančnost in povjerenje, ispravne praznine, in ponovno probajte.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, have the learner explain the next step, then use a quiz or flashcard to check whether the idea stuck.
entries.value: Vprašajte za savjet, neka učenec razložiti sljedeči korak, a zatim uporabljate kviz ali kartica za ponavljanje preveriti da li je ideja zaglavila.

entries.source: Ask for a hint, not the answer
entries.value: Prosi za namig, ne za odgovor

entries.source: Ask for a hint, question, or step check before the answer.
entries.value: Vprašajte za savjet, vprašanje ali provjeru koraka preden odgovora.

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Vprašajte za savjet. Ne vprašajte za končni odgovor još.

entries.source: Ask for a misconception check, a short retrieval question, or a harder example. Answer before asking the AI to correct you.
entries.value: Vprašajte za pogrešnu provjeru, kratko vprašanje o dohvatu ali težjo primer. Odgovorite preden nego kar pitate UI da vas ispravi.

entries.source: Ask for a simpler explanation of the weakest concept.
entries.value: Prosi za preprostejšo razlago najšibkejšega koncepta.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Traži mali prvi korak, a ne končni odgovor.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
Ask for a tiny first task.
Ask for a topic, level, or word list; then introduce a small set.
entries.value: Vprašajte za temu, razinu, ali popis riječi, a zatim uvedite mali skup.

entries.source: Ask for artwork/style or provide a looking framework.
entries.value: Vprašajte za umjetnost/stil ali pružiti okvir za traženje.

entries.source: Ask for assignment names, due dates, effort, and current status.
entries.value: Vprašajte za imena zadatka, datume dospiječa, napor in trenutni status.

entries.source: Ask for audience, goal, and draft status if unclear; then give focused feedback.
entries.value: Vprašajte za publiku, cilj, in nacrt statusa ako je nejasno, a zatim dati usredotočen povratnu informaciju.

entries.source: Ask for author, title, date, publisher, URL, and access date when needed.
entries.value: Vprašajte za autora, naslov, datum, izdavač, URL, in dostopni datum ko je potrebno.

entries.source: Ask for available time, must-do tasks, and energy level.
entries.value: Vprašajte za raspoloživo vrijeme, zadače ki moraju učiniti, in razinu energije.

entries.source: Ask for commitment, partner/context, check-in frequency, and proof.
entries.value: Vprašajte za predanost, partner/kontekst, prijavu frekvencije, in dokaz.

entries.source: Ask for domain and difficulty, then set the case brief and first decision.
entries.value: Vprašajte za domenu in poteškoče, a zatim odredite primer kvojnek in prva odluka.

entries.source: Ask for event and depth, then separate background causes from immediate triggers.
entries.value: Vprašajte za dogadžaj in dubinu, a zatim odvojiti pozadinu uzroke od trenutnih okidača.

entries.source: Ask for exam date, syllabus, available time, and confidence by topic.
entries.value: Vprašajte za ispit datum, nastavni načrt, dostupno vrijeme, in povjerenje po temi.

entries.source: Ask for five questions that mix definitions, examples, and transfer problems.
entries.value: Prosi za pet vprašanj, ki združujejo definicije, primere in naloge prenosa znanja.

entries.source: Ask for format, time limit, and audience; then begin a practice round.
entries.value: Vprašajte za format, vremensko ograničenje, in publiku, a zatim započnite trening krug.

entries.source: Ask for goal, constraints, and desired vibe; then offer a varied idea set.
entries.value: Vprašajte za cilj, ograničenja, in željene vibracije, a zatim ponuditi raznovrstan set ideja.

entries.source: Ask for goal, timeline, tasks, and what counts as real progress.
entries.value: Vprašajte za cilj, vremensku liniju, naloge, in ono kar se računa kao stvaran napredak.

entries.source: Ask for grading scale, weights, current scores, and target.
entries.value: Vprašajte za ocjenjivanje ljestvicu, težjone, trenutne rezultate, in metu.

entries.source: Ask for group size, goal, duration, and check-in cadence.
entries.value: Vprašajte za veličinu grupe, cilj, trajanje, in check-in kadenca.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, and feedback before asking for a finished answer.
entries.value: Vprašajte za savjete, provjere, in povratne informacije preden nego kar pitate za završeni odgovor.

entries.source: Ask for hints, checks, feedback, and study plans that keep the thinking with the learner.
entries.value: Prosi za namige, preverjanja, povratne informacije in učne načrte, ki razmišljanje pustijo učencu.

entries.source: Ask for language, goal, and code/error if relevant.
entries.value: Vprašajte za jezik, cilj, in kod/teror ako je relevantno.

entries.source: Ask for language, learner level, and scenario; then start in character.
entries.value: Vprašajte za jezik, razinu učenca in scenarij, a zatim počnite v karakteru.

entries.source: Ask for material, deadline, and prior confidence.
entries.value: Vprašajte za materijal, rok, in prethodno povjerenje.

entries.source: Ask for one revision priority, not a finished replacement.
entries.value: Tražite jedan revidirani prioritet, a ne završena zamjena.

entries.source: Ask for one small task before asking for the answer.
entries.value: Vprašajte za jedan mali naloga preden nego kar pitate za odgovor.

entries.source: Ask for one structural priority instead of a full rewrite.
entries.value: Traži jedan strukturni prioritet umjesto punog prepiska.

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: Tražite jednu ideju z namigima in zajedničkim zamkama.

entries.source: Ask for outcome, duration, distractions, and starting state.
entries.value: Vprašajte za ishod, trajanje, ometanja, in početno stanje.

entries.source: Ask for place or theme, then orient with location, scale, and key features.
entries.value: Vprašajte za mjesto ali temu, a zatim orijentirati z lokacijom, ljestvice, in ključne značajke.

entries.source: Ask for prerequisites, a simple model, examples, and a common misconception.
entries.value: Vprašajte za preduvjete, jednostavan načinel, primere in zajedničku napačno predstavo.

entries.source: Ask for research goal, level, and available sources.
entries.value: Vprašajte za raziščivački cilj, razinu, in dostupne izvore.

entries.source: Ask for role, audience, and background; then run a first question.
entries.value: Vprašajte za ulogu, publiku in pozadinu, a zatim pokrenite prvo vprašanje.

entries.source: Ask for source material and pair type.
entries.value: Traži izvorni materijal in tip para.

entries.source: Ask for source material or topic and target difficulty.
entries.value: Vprašajte za izvorni materijal ali temu in ciljane poteškoče.

entries.source: Ask for source material, topic, and target detail if missing.
entries.value: Vprašajte za izvorni materijal, temu, in ciljni detalj ako nedostaje.

entries.source: Ask for structure, evidence, and clarity feedback while keeping the final draft yours.
entries.value: Vprašajte za strukturu, dokaze, in jasnoču povratnu informaciju dok zadržavate končni nacrt svoje.
